g.text: Subtitle text for descriptions and summaries
Body large text for paragraphs and descriptions
Body medium is the default text size for UI content
Body small is used for secondary information and metadata
Footnote text for disclaimers and fine print
Light — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Normal — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Medium — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Semibold — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Bold — The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Base: border-radius 6px · inline-flex · align-items center · justify-content center
trigger: padding 6px 12px · radius 6px · dropdown: radius 8px · shadow-dropdown · option: padding 10px 14px
container: gap 6px · padding 6px 10px · radius 6px · chip: bg #F3F4F6 radius 4px · suggestions: radius 6px shadow-popover
inline-flex · border: 1px solid #E3E8EF · radius: 8px · option: padding 6px 16px radius 6px · active: bg #ecf3fc color #4185DE weight 600 · shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(65,133,222,0.12)
flex · space-between · padding: 0 4px · border-bottom: 1px solid #E3E8EF · bg: #FFF
